title: それはきっと、青写真よりも

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's breaktime at summer camp. I find Mejiro
McQueen leafing through a pretty hefty book.
choice_data_list: What kind of book do you have there?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Oh, are you interested too, Trainer? Care to join
me?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro McQueen beckons me over. I sit down
next to her and take a look at the book...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
It's a photo collection which chronicles the
glorious moments of the Mejiros.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
This photo is but one of many. It shows a plaque
that was earned after an arduous 3,200-meter
journey, a very important memory to my
grandmother.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
For every Mejiro, there lies a path forged by the
greats. Which is why one day...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I, too, want to stand on that peak. I will achieve
the same dream that was cherished by the Mejiros
before me.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She takes her time viewing each photo in the
album. Her eyes give away the emotions welling
up inside.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
choice_data_list: Is something wrong?
Is something wrong?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Nothing, it's just that this one caught my eye. It
has a different feeling to the others.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The photo is a scenic view taken from a hill.
Observing it, I can almost hear the whistling
breeze.
choice_data_list: ...What a beautiful place.
...What a beautiful place.

text_block_list.text:
Oh my... that's a photo one of our predecessors
took during their own summer camp.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Oh, Ardan? How long have you been there?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. Would you like me to tell you where this
photo was taken? I will say, it's a bit of a steep
trek, though.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Ardan explains the route, likening the hike
to a challenging training session.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
According to the instructions Ardan gave us, first
we enter the dense thicket on the left and climb
the slope to the top. All right, let's make haste!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Huff... Phew... The breeze feels so nice. ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Together with a jovial Mejiro McQueen, I journey
to the photo's location. However...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff... Trainer, I believe we still have some ways to go!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Eeeek! Is that a hornet?!
choice_data_list: Let's make a break for it!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff... The grass is dense, and there are insects aplenty. I suppose this is the great outdoors, though...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro McQueen, despite the hurdles, chooses to
press on. I point out a detour on the map that
could make it easier.
choice_data_list: (...I don't want her to push herself any further.)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: There's no road out here to follow. Plus...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The scenery we'll find is bound to be the same as
the photo. As beautiful as it is...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Gasp... Is this the br-bridge?! Gulp.
choice_data_list: ...We can always turn back.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: ...But we haven't made it there yet.
choice_data_list: Why do you want to see the scenery so much?
Why do you want to see the scenery so much?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Oh! Well, that's because... I've only seen it in the
photo...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I haven't experienced it for myself. If I limit my
dreams to photos and imagination, I'll never make
them a reality.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I'll be fine, Trainer. As long as your hand is here
to guide me, I can proceed forward, past this old
bridge and my apprehensions.
choice_data_list: ...I understand.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I take her hand, we cross the bridge, and go over
the hills. The two of us press ahead, never once
looking back...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
choice_data_list: This is where the photo was taken!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
...Yes, indeed. But compared to the photo, this is
much more...
choice_data_list: Beautiful...
Beautiful...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I expected it to look like the photo. But the
reality is far more vibrant. The scent of the
flowers captures my senses...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
...As I thought, you mustn't settle with a simple
photo or a dream.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
If we had cut our journey short, how would we
have experienced the flowers' sweet scent, or the
rustling of the leaves? This beauty would've been
lost to us.
choice_data_list: ...McQueen?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Reality is far more beautiful. More beautiful than
a photo, my imagination, or my dreams.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her gaze doesn't stop at this scenery. It extends
beyond, to her road of dreams...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Toward a 3,200-meter journey far more difficult
than the steep and arduous path of today.
choice_data_list:
(I know what she's thinking, what she's set her
sights on...)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: I want to win first place in the spring Tenno Sho.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
For all the people who've supported my
grandmother, my family, and me. The dream that
they see through us—I want to make it a reality.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
And just like we experienced today, the
achievement will be far more beautiful in reality. I
want to see and feel it for myself.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her goal has not changed from the day we
met—to win the Tenno Sho, a goal long sought by
the Mejiro family.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: ...Hehe.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I apologize, I got a little carried away there. The
sky feels so close from here. It's wonderful.
choice_data_list:
Perhaps your predecessors wanted to share
their dreams in the same way.

Perhaps your predecessors wanted to share
their dreams in the same way.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Oh! Maybe that's why they included this photo in
the album...
choice_data_list:
Let's take our own photo to symbolize our
determination.

Let's take our own photo to symbolize our
determination.
Let's commit this scenery to memory.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Oh! Maybe that's why they included this photo in
the album...
choice_data_list:
Let's take our own photo to symbolize our
determination.

Let's take our own photo to symbolize our
determination.
Let's commit this scenery to memory.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: ...Yes, we should.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
This photo will be a reminder of the
determination we felt today. And then, perhaps...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, a new runner will travel to this same
location, and declare their dreams for the future.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: ...Yes.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Let us remember, how this scenic view that my
predecessors preserved in a photo was far more
beautiful in reality.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
That way, the two of us may realize a dream far
more beautiful than any photo or any desire
could portray.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, I take in the view with Mejiro McQueen
for a little while longer.
